task: Advanced high-value task: Robust Facility Location Candidate Constraint Violation Ledger. Scenario: a production incident review board wants to convert raw records into a repeatable decision process for robust facility location candidate. Embedded packet: Records: R1 capacity_units=28 demand_units=53 fixed_cost_k=1; R2 capacity_units=37 demand_units=49 fixed_cost_k=4; R3 capacity_units=23 demand_units=64 fixed_cost_k=0. Remediation options: O1 changes capacity_units by -12% cost=69500; O2 changes demand_units by -18% cost=89500; O3 changes fixed_cost_k by -25% cost=50500; max_budget=114000. Rules and constraints: unmet demand penalty applies when capacity<demand; choose minimum expected cost; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: produce a concise gate decision that includes calculations, caveats, residual risk, and machine-readable exception labels. Deliver facility_location_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
